summary: ANDROID | Low battery notification shown on app cold start despite full battery
scenario: Low battery notification erroneously displayed on app cold start despite connected device having high battery level
description_clean: Low battery notification incorrectly shown on app cold start (first launch) even though the connected device's battery level is high. Expected behavior: no low battery notification should appear when the device battery level is high.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app (cold start / first launch after force close).
2. Connect to a Poly Bluetooth audio device with a high battery level (e.g., >80%).
3. Observe the Home screen for any notification or banner.
expected: No low battery notification should appear on the Home screen when the connected device's battery level is high.
actual: A low battery notification is incorrectly displayed on the Home screen upon cold start, even though the device battery level is high.
